description: Dutch clinical data platform for medical research. Simplifies clinical data capture, management, and analysis for researchers. EDC (Electronic Data Capture) platform used in clinical trials and research studies globally.
business_model: B2B - Research data platform to pharma, CROs, academic medical centers
key_investors: Two Sigma, INKEF Capital, Balderton Capital
competitive_advantage: User-friendly interface, rapid study setup, GDPR compliant

varden_fit.rationale: Research infrastructure - could support occupational health research
